ddls:
CREATE TABLE "care_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each care plan */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the care plan resource */,
  "slice_name" TEXT /* Name of the slice */,
  "alias" TEXT /* Aliases for the care plan */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the care plan */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minimum occurrences allowed */,
  "max" TEXT /* Maximum occurrences allowed */,
  "must_support" INTEGER /* Indicates if the element must be supported */,
  "is_modifier" INTEGER /* Indicates if the element is a modifier */,
  "is_summary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the element is a summary */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the care plan */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the care plan */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Detailed definition of the care plan */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for the care plan element */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the care plan element */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the care plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the care plan becomes active */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the care plan ends or is retired */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the care plan is for */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the care plan */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the care plan */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status against FHIR standards */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the care plan */,
  "external_references" TEXT /* Links to external resources or documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the care plan this metadata belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the care plan */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile reference indicating the rules and guidelines followed */,
  "security_labels" TEXT /* Security or sensitivity labels for the care plan */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* System or application that created the metadata */,
  "source_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier from the source system */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source system */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the source system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES care_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., provider, admin, patient) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the plan */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access action */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES care_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slicing_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each slicing rule */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the care plan this rule applies to */,
  "discriminator" TEXT /* Discriminator used in the slicing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the slicing rule */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order in which the slicing rule should be applied */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that must be met for the slicing rule to apply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the slicing rule was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the slicing rule */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the slicing rule was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the slicing rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slicing_rules_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES care_plans ("plan_id")
)
